_howToUpdate: To add a new series: (1) Set the old 'current:true' entry to false. (2) Add a new object at the TOP of 'series' with 'current:true' and all 25 rewards. All series use the same schema. Set 'milestone:true' on the 5 key rewards (lv 5/10/15/20/25). Fields: imgUrl = consolegameswiki image URL or null; demoUrl = YouTube URL or null.

rewards.name: Journey Begins
